title: Could you already be Canadian? New citizenship law opens doors for thousands born abroad - Green & Spiegel
content:
## Could you already be Canadian? New citizenship law opens doors for thousands born abroad
Senior Associate Valerie Kleinman shared her insights with The American Bazaar on Canada’s updated Citizenship Act (Bill C-3), explaining how the removal of the first-generation limit for citizenship by descent could allow thousands born abroad to Canadian parents to newly qualify for or already hold Canadian citizenship.

#### Valerie Kleinman B.PAPM, LL.L, J.D.
